mapper.select:
SELECT r.receipt_id, r.receipt_no, r.doc_id, r.doc_type, DATE_FORMAT(r.order_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS order_date, r.partner_name, r.requester_id, r.approver_id, r.total_amount, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, req.name AS requester_name, apr.name AS approver_name, d.doc_no FROM order_receipt r LEFT JOIN member req ON r.requester_id = req.member_id LEFT JOIN member apr ON r.approver_id = apr.member_id LEFT JOIN approval_doc d ON r.doc_id = d.doc_id
r.doc_type = #{searchDocType}
AND (r.receipt_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR r.partner_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.receipt_id, r.receipt_no, r.doc_id, r.doc_type, DATE_FORMAT(r.order_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS order_date, r.partner_name, r.requester_id, r.approver_id, r.total_amount, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at, req.name AS requester_name, apr.name AS approver_name, d.doc_no FROM order_receipt r LEFT JOIN member req ON r.requester_id = req.member_id LEFT JOIN member apr ON r.approver_id = apr.member_id LEFT JOIN approval_doc d ON r.doc_id = d.doc_id WHERE r.receipt_id = #{receiptId}
SELECT item_id, receipt_id, product_id, product_code, product_name, unit, qty, unit_cost, amount FROM order_receipt_item WHERE receipt_id = #{receiptId} ORDER BY item_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_receipt (receipt_no, doc_id, doc_type, order_date, partner_name, requester_id, approver_id, total_amount, created_at) VALUES (#{receiptNo}, #{docId}, #{docType}, NOW(), #{partnerName}, #{requesterId}, #{approverId}, #{totalAmount}, NOW())

INSERT INTO order_receipt_item (receipt_id, product_id, product_code, product_name, unit, qty, unit_cost, amount) VALUES (#{receiptId}, #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{unit}, #{qty}, #{unitCost}, #{amount})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_receipt WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
